title: Bouncy-QQ Jamaican Sick-Day Sour-Creamed Appetizer
description: A unique appetizer that combines the flavors of Jamaica with the comfort of sour cream and chive dip, finished with a touch of tempering-chocolate. This dish is suitable for a Buddhist temple setting.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat and saut60 in the scotch bonnet peppers until fragrant.
Add in canned coconut milk and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in Greek yogurt and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with chives and sour cream.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 10-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Drizzle the melted chocolate over the top of the sour cream and chives.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional chives if desired.
